sunscreen-stick.usecase.jpg: Split-screen ad: left side showing a hand placing the sunscreen stick on a bicycle frame; right side showing a bright magenta background with bold white text.
sunscreen-stick.infographic.jpg: Ad graphic: left side has a yellow background with blue text; right side shows the sunscreen stick in orange and blue blister card packaging.

facial-mist.usecase.jpg: Cosmetic ad with pink background. Left: close-up of a woman holding the mist bottle near her face. Right: orange text statistic boxes.
facial-mist.infographic.jpg: White infographic with header 'AVENE'. The mist bottle is on the left with pointer lines to orange text sections on the right.

wire-stripper.usecase.jpg: Hands using the wire stripper on a green wire over a wooden workbench cluttered with tools and gloves.
wire-stripper.infographic.jpg: Product infographic on a white background. The wire stripper is centered with grey pointer lines to descriptive feature labels.

backpack.usecase.jpg: Studio photo of a woman in a green jacket standing against an off-white background, carrying the black backpack on her back.
backpack.infographic.jpg: Dimension infographic on a grey-white background. The backpack is centered with lines and text showing height, width, and depth measurements.

laundry-detergent.usecase.jpg: Ad photo on a beach. A woman in a knit cardigan holds the detergent bottle. Circular stamp at top right and text at bottom.
laundry-detergent.usecase2.jpg: Ad photo of a hand pouring detergent into a white porcelain sink with running water. A pink knit sweater sits on the counter.
laundry-detergent.usecase3.jpg: Detergent bottle lying horizontally on a wet reflective surface with water droplets. A beige knit blanket is in the soft-focus background.
laundry-detergent.infographic.jpg: Product infographic on a light background. The detergent bottle stands next to a folded blue sweater, citrus fruit, and product feature text.

perfume2.placement.jpg: Pink triangular perfume bottle lying flat on green moss, surrounded by white flowers and amber crystals on a light green background.
perfume2.usecase.jpg: Product photo of the triangular perfume bottle tucked inside a black leather shoulder bag on a mint green background.
perfume2.infographic.jpg: Product display photo on a white background, showcasing the triangular perfume bottle standing next to its pink rectangular packaging box.

facial-cleanser.usecase_DEFECT.jpg: Split-layout cosmetic ad. Left side has vertical text; right side shows the cleanser bottle covered in white soap bubbles and foam.
facial-cleanser.infographic.jpg: Cosmetic display on a white background. The cleanser bottle stands on a smear of yellow gel, with text on the left.

northface-backpack.usecase.jpg: Studio photo of a man seen from behind wearing a white shirt and carrying the black backpack.

hammer.usecase.jpg: Close-up of hands using the stubby hammer to drive a nail into a wooden block.
hammer.infographic.jpg: Dimension infographic on a white background. The hammer is upright with orange labels showing measurements and dimension lines.

rice-cooker.usecase.jpg: Kitchen photo of the rice cooker on a marble countertop next to a bowl of rice and a jar of uncooked rice.
rice-cooker.close-up.jpg: Ad graphic focusing on the rice cooker's control panel, with four circular inset food images and labels below.
rice-cooker.infographic.jpg: Size infographic on white. The rice cooker is centered with dimension arrows and a blue side panel showing included accessories.

lawn-mower.usecase.jpg: Ad photo of a person pushing the lawn mower on green grass, with a black text banner at the bottom.
lawn-mower.usecase2.jpg: Smiling man pushing the lawn mower on a green grassy hill under sunny sky, with a black banner at bottom.
lawn-mower.infographic.jpg: Feature callout infographic on white background. The lawn mower is centered with orange lines pointing to key features, and text at top.

SSD.usecase.jpg: Close-up of a hand installing the M.2 SSD card into a motherboard PCIe slot with pink and blue lighting.
SSD.infographic.jpg: Promotional banner: the M.2 SSD card floats in a dark futuristic server room with neon blue lights and text below.

running-shoes.usecase.jpg: Catalog photo of a pair of black running shoes sitting on a grey concrete floor, soft shadows.
running-shoes.usecase2.jpg: Black running shoes sitting on their white box, placed on a grey upholstered sofa.

eye-serum.close-up.jpg: Close-up ad showing the eye serum tube nozzle dispensing yellow cream gel, on a pastel pink background with text labels.
eye-serum.usecase-DEFECT.jpg: Ad with pink background showing hands dispensing a dot of yellow eye serum gel onto a finger, with instructions on left.
eye-serum.infographic.jpg: Promotional poster with the eye serum tube resting diagonally on pink geometric shelves, with text benefits on the top left.

small-wallet.placement.jpg: Product photo of two bowknot wallets, one purple and one cream, on a split pink and white background.
small-wallet.usecase.jpg: A woman in a pink blazer holds the cream bowknot wallet in front of her face, with golden bokeh lights.
small-wallet.infographic.jpg: White infographic showing two wallet styles side-by-side labeled 'style 1' and 'style 2', with 'OR' in the middle.

bifold-wallet.usecase.jpg: Close-up photo of a man putting the dark brown bifold wallet into the back pocket of his jeans.
bifold-wallet.infographic.jpg: Dimension infographic on light grey background. The bifold wallet is centered with lines showing height, width, and thickness.

tape-measure.usecase.jpg: Close-up of hands pulling out the yellow blade of the tape measure over a dark workstation.
tape-measure.close-up.jpg: Macro close-up shot of the tape measure highlighting the rubberized casing and the metal blade slot.
tape-measure.infographic.jpg: Feature infographic. The tape measure is centered with pointers to feature labels and a yellow banner at the top.

cleaning-paste.usecase.jpg: Split-layout cleaning ad. Left side has pink graphics; right side shows hands in pink gloves holding the cleaning paste tub.
cleaning-paste.infographic.jpg: Commercial graphic with the cleaning paste tub centered against a pink patterned header and white bottom.

massage-lotion.usecase.jpg: Product graphic on white background. A hand holds the lotion bottle upright, with a circular seal on the left.
massage-lotion.infographic.jpg: Instructional infographic with orange frame. The lotion bottle is on the right, with a 'HOW TO USE' header on the left.

knife.usecase.jpg: Close-up of a person in a denim apron using the kitchen knife to slice red cabbage on a wooden board.
knife.infographic.jpg: Feature infographic on dark background. The kitchen knife is shown vertically with a layered blade diagram and text callouts.

pepper-mill.usecase.jpg: Ad photo showing hands grinding pepper from the mill into a bowl of eggs, with a black banner at bottom.
pepper-mill.close-up.jpg: Close-up shot of the white top grinding mechanism of the pepper mill, with text descriptions above.
pepper-mill.infographic.jpg: Sizing infographic on white background. The pepper mill stands centered with dimension lines and height/width measurements.

headphones.usecase_DEFECT.jpg: Ad photo of a girl lying on grass wearing the headphones. Text at top and four circular inset images at bottom.
headphones.infographic_DEFECT.jpg: Infographic on light blue background with floating leaves. The headphones are centered, with 'Kids Friendly' text and a 'BPA FREE' badge.

guitar-pedal.usecase.jpg: Ad photo showing the yellow guitar pedal on a rug in front of a guitar amplifier, with text in the upper-left.
guitar-pedal.infographic.jpg: Promotional banner showing the yellow guitar pedal centered against a glowing orange accretion disk background, with text at the top.

perfume.usecase.jpg: Ad photo of the pink perfume bottle on white surface, surrounded by dragon fruit slices and tropical flowers, with text on left.
perfume.usecase2.jpg: Ad photo showing the pink perfume bottle lying amidst green tropical leaves, plumeria, and a red anthurium flower.
perfume.infographic.jpg: Ad photo of two pink perfume bottles standing next to each other against a pink and yellow wall with leaf shadows.

CD-player.usecase.jpg: Ad graphic with a senior man on a sofa next to the blue boombox, with text at the top and circular feature insets.
CD-player.infographic.jpg: Infographic on light grey background. The boombox is centered with speakers visually popping out, with a smartphone in the foreground.

keyboard.usecase.jpg: Ad graphic of the keyboard on a blue desk with purple underglow, with text at top and a function banner at bottom.
keyboard.infographic.jpg: Comparative infographic on blue. Top headers show product comparisons with side-by-side column tables, and the keyboard is shown at the bottom.
